title: Whimscape Better Eating and Drinking Animations
description: An (unofficial) add-on pack that makes the Whimscape Eating and Drinking Animations Better!
body:
- Thanks to [kavast](https://modrinth.com/user/kavast) _for his resource pack_ Whimscape

> [![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cab30d3739908c7958f04d056f509c2482950f73.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape)

# This pack tries to reimagine the Whimscape Eating and Drinking Animations by animating them.

![HMI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7e34c2974fac6a44a3437ee5bd965971d02f59c.gif)

## !3D version coming soon!
